You have 20 health points - don't let too many enemies through! Upgrade your towers and deploy powerful heroes with special abilities to turn the tide of battle. Complete waves to earn gold and unlock new defenses. Can you survive all the waves and protect your realm? Kingdom Defense

Defend your kingdom against waves of invading enemies! Strategically place towers on fixed plots along the enemy path to stop them from reaching your base. You have 20 health points - don't let too many enemies through! Upgrade your towers and deploy powerful heroes with special abilities to turn the tide of battle. Complete waves to earn gold and unlock new defenses. Can you survive all the waves and protect your realm?

Arrow Keys (←→): Select tower type or navigate UI | Space: Place selected tower / Activate hero ability | Z: Upgrade selected tower | Shift: Deploy/Move hero to target location | Number Keys (1-4): Quick select tower types | Enter: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart (from game over screen)

Kingdom Defense

Defend your kingdom against waves of invading enemies! Strategically place towers on fixed plots along the enemy path to stop them from reaching your base. You have 20 health points - don't let too many enemies through! Upgrade your towers and deploy powerful heroes with special abilities to turn the tide of battle. Complete waves to earn gold and unlock new defenses. Can you survive all the waves and protect your realm?

Arrow Keys (←→): Select tower type or navigate UI | Space: Place selected tower / Activate hero ability | Z: Upgrade selected tower | Shift: Deploy/Move hero to target location | Number Keys (1-4): Quick select tower types | Enter: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart (from game over screen)

test_1_ModeBtn.expected_outcome: Game runs without errors for multiple waves. Towers are successfully placed, enemies spawn and move along paths, combat occurs, and the game eventually reaches GAME_OVER (win or lose). No crashes or freezes occur.

TEST_2.test_description: Optimal strategy test that implements the best approach to win the game. Places towers strategically at chokepoints, upgrades them efficiently, and uses hero abilities tactically to maximize defense.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Prioritize placing archer towers at the start of the path for early damage, upgrade them to level 2, then add mage towers for area damage. Deploy heroes at critical moments and use abilities when enemy clusters appear. Balance gold spending between new towers and upgrades.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully defend the base through all waves with minimal health loss. Reach GAME_OVER_WIN state by preventing enemies from depleting all 20 health points. Demonstrates that the game is winnable with good strategy.

TEST_3.test_description: Hero mechanics test focusing on hero deployment, movement, and ability usage. Validates that heroes can be positioned strategically and their abilities work correctly.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Place minimal towers and rely heavily on hero positioning and abilities. Move hero frequently to engage different enemy groups and spam ability usage when available to test cooldown mechanics.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Hero successfully moves to different positions, engages enemies in melee combat, and abilities activate properly with cooldowns. Game progresses naturally even with hero-focused strategy.

TEST_4.test_description: Tower upgrade path test that validates the upgrade system and checks if upgraded towers provide meaningful improvements in combat effectiveness.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Place a few towers early and focus all gold on upgrading them to maximum level before placing new towers. Compare damage output and effectiveness of upgraded vs basic towers.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Upgraded towers demonstrate increased damage, range, or special effects. Gold is properly deducted for upgrades. Successfully progress through several waves with fewer but stronger towers.

TEST_5.test_description: Economy and resource management test that validates gold earning, spending, and the balance between tower quantity and quality throughout the game.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Track gold income from enemy kills, test different spending patterns (many cheap towers vs few expensive ones), and validate that gold management is a meaningful strategic choice.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Gold is earned at appropriate rates, spending decisions impact defensive capabilities, and the economy system supports varied viable strategies. Game remains balanced and challenging.
